name: zfmv_script_update
description: zFMV_Script::Update advances the current FMV action by relative time, keeps active actions, ends completed actions, and begins the next action at the same relative time.
known_limits: VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through zfmv_script_cleanup_reset; Binary Ninja byte comparison is still pending for zFMV_Script::Update.
Source dependencies are accepted as limited because the optional abort/poll path crosses zInput helpers that remain zInput class-pass binary debt.
